message:
feat(wish): add listen_with_listener for race-free test server startup

Add a public listen_with_listener(TcpListener) method that accepts a
pre-bound listener, enabling callers to bind to port 0 and pass the
listener directly. Eliminates TOCTOU port races in tests.

lib.rs:
- New listen_with_listener() public API accepting TcpListener
- Both listen() and listen_with_listener() delegate to private
  listen_with_listener_inner()

tests/common/mod.rs:
- Replace pick_unused_port() (atomic counter + manual scanning) with
  direct bind to 127.0.0.1:0 + listen_with_listener()
- Replace wait_for_port() (plain TCP connect) with wait_for_ssh_server()
  that performs actual SSH identification exchange handshake
- Significantly more reliable test setup

docs/wish/architecture.md:
- Clarify window resize forwarding comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
